# Red Ledger - Character Portrait Prompts
## Style Guide
- **Format**: Square portrait, bust/shoulders up, dark moody background
- **Style**: Semi-realistic anime, dark urban fantasy / noir aesthetic
- **Lighting**: Dramatic rim lighting, neon undertones for Korean chars, candlelight for vampires
- **Resolution**: 512x512 minimum, clean edges for circular crop
- **Common prefix**: `portrait bust, dark background, dramatic lighting, semi-realistic anime style, detailed face, `

---

## CENTER (혈연센터 직원들)
> Visual identity: White/light blue medical uniforms, ID badges, sterile clean look with subtle shadows hinting at secrets

### 1. park-harin (박하린) - 혈연센터장 [RARE / support]
```
portrait bust, dark background, dramatic lighting, semi-realistic anime style, detailed face, Korean woman in her late 30s, sharp intelligent eyes, warm smile with cold undertone, neat shoulder-length black hair pinned back, white lab coat over navy blouse, blood center director badge, reading glasses on head, subtle neon-blue rim light, confident authoritative posture, faint shadows crossing her face suggesting hidden knowledge
```


## KARTEIN (카르테인 가문 - 뱀파이어)

---

## Quick Reference - Rarity Visual Cues
| Rarity | Visual Treatment |
|--------|-----------------|
| **Common** | Simple everyday appearance, warm ordinary lighting |
| **Uncommon** | Slightly refined, professional edge, cooler lighting |
| **Rare** | Distinctive memorable features, dramatic lighting, stronger mood |
| **Legendary** | Overwhelming presence, golden/crimson aura, rich detail, dramatic composition |

## Quick Reference - Faction Color Palette
| Faction | Primary | Secondary | Accent |
|---------|---------|-----------|--------|
| **CENTER** | White, Light Blue | Navy, Silver | Subtle Neon Blue |
| **KARTEIN** | Black, Crimson | Gold, Deep Purple | Blood Red, Moonlight Silver |
| **NEUTRAL** | Earth tones, Gray | Warm browns | Occupation-specific color |
